channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kyle Sandilands sues ARN Media over cancelled $100 million contract
item.description: Kyle Sandilands, the former shock jock of Kiis FM, has filed a lawsuit against ARN Media after the company abruptly cancelled his lucrative $100 million contract. The Federal Court documents served on...

item.title: ANC Dispute in Joburg Leadership Challenged in Court Over Alleged Election Irregularities
item.description: ANC veteran Stanley Itshegetseng has taken legal action against the Johannesburg regional executive committee (REC) election, claiming irregularities that could render it unlawful. In a court filing a...

item.title: Urgent Safety Upgrades Needed at Wilson Airport After Near-Crash Incident
item.description: Last Friday, a plane crash-landed at Wilson Airport in Nairobi but thankfully, all 34 passengers and five crew members came out unhurt. The aircraft, coming from Kisumu, veered off the runway, highlig...

item.title: Severe flooding in Hawaii causes major power outages and extensive damage
item.description: Hawaii has been struck by its worst flooding in over two decades, leaving more than 2,000 residents without power on Sunday afternoon. The flooding followed heavy rainfall that overwhelmed soil alread...

item.title: Pakistan Day Celebrated Nationwide with Ceremonies and Prayers
item.description: Pakistan Day was observed across the country on March 23, 2026, with official celebrations starting with a 31-gun salute in Islamabad and 21-gun salutes in provincial capitals. Special prayers were he...

item.title: Marcos Forms Crisis Committee to Address Rising Fuel Prices Due to Middle East Conflict
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. has directed the creation of a national crisis committee to deal with the economic effects of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which has caused sharp ...

item.title: Siya Kuse Pursues WBC Title, Aims to Secure Family's Future
item.description: South African boxer Siya Kuse is preparing for a highly anticipated rematch against Filipino Melvin Jerusalem for the WBC mini-flyweight title on May 16th at Emperors Palace in Kempton Park. Kuse, who...

item.title: Timberwolves stage comeback over Celtics; Nuggets defeat Blazers in recent NBA games
item.description: In an exciting night of NBA action on March 23, 2026, the Minnesota Timberwolves made a remarkable comeback to defeat the Boston Celtics, showcasing their resilience and strategic gameplay. Despite tr...

item.title: The ‘Double-engine’ Slogan and the Federal Question
item.description: The phrase ‘double-engine sarkar’ sounds like a harmless and catchy slogan, suggesting that if both the Union and State governments are run by the same party, development will progress faster. However...

item.title: Israel expands ground operations in Lebanon amid rising civilian toll
item.description: The Israeli military has declared an expansion of its ground campaign in Lebanon, signalling what it terms a prolonged operation. The move follows orders from Israeli officials to destroy all bridges ...

item.title: Norland College graduates earn £50,000 starting salaries as the school seeks university status
item.description: Norland College, the renowned institution based in Bath that trains professional nannies, is on the verge of becoming a recognised university. Established in 1892, Norland guarantees its graduates emp...

item.title: President and Prime Minister Emphasise National Unity on Pakistan Day
item.description: On the occasion of Pakistan Day, both President Asif Ali Zardari and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif sent heartfelt greetings to the nation, highlighting the importance of unity and solidarity for the c...

item.title: Osimhen faces scan to assess arm injury after Liverpool match
item.description: Victor Osimhen, the Galatasaray striker, arrived in Istanbul on Sunday night for a scan following the arm injury he sustained in last Wednesday’s UEFA Champions League match against Liverpool. Osimhen...

item.title: Fraudster who stole £300,000 from pensioner tracked down in Tenerife after lavish spending spree
item.description: Pamela Gwinnett, a 63-year-old woman, stole £300,000 from 89-year-old Joan Green, isolating her from family members and convincing her to transfer power of attorney. Gwinnett used the stolen money for...

item.title: AmaZulu Keep Top-eight Hopes Alive with Important Away Victory Over Polokwane City
item.description: AmaZulu coach Arthur Zwane has stressed the importance of collecting points as they continue their strong run this season. After a crucial 1-0 away win against Polokwane City, secured by a late goal f...

item.title: Walmart to Implement Digital Price Tags Across All U.S. Stores by 2026
item.description: Walmart is set to replace its paper price tags with digital shelf labels (DSLs) across all U.S. stores by the end of 2026. These new digital tags promise to increase operational efficiency by reducing...

item.title: Public Concerns Rise Over Ruto-Opposition Political Exchanges
item.description: The public is voicing serious concerns about the increasingly hostile exchanges between President William Ruto and opposition politicians. Several citizens have reached out to Nation Africa expressing...

item.title: Iowa eliminates top-seeded Florida in NCAA Tournament with late 3-pointer
item.description: In a thrilling second-round matchup of the NCAA Tournament, ninth-seeded Iowa upset the No. 1 seed and defending national champion Florida with a 73-72 win, thanks to Alvaro Folgueiras’s 3-pointer wit...

item.title: Asian Stocks Fall Sharply Amid Trump-Iran Infrastructure Threat
item.description: Asian markets experienced a significant downturn on Monday, with South Korea's Kospi plunging as much as 6.3% and other key indices across the region suffering substantial losses. The sharp decline fo...

item.title: One Nation's Growing Influence in South Australia Signals Major Political Shift
item.description: The 2026 South Australian state election results have revealed a major shift in the political landscape, with One Nation making significant inroads into traditionally strong Liberal areas. As the vote...
